chunks.title: Laws on Holy Gifts for Priests
chunks.reason: A continuous legal section addressing priestly purity and consumption of holy offerings.

chunks.title: Qualifications for Sacrificial Animals
chunks.reason: A distinct legal unit specifying physical requirements for burnt and peace offerings.

chunks.title: Laws on Young Animals and Thanksgiving
chunks.reason: A final legal section covering timing for young animals, slaughter rules, and thanksgiving offerings.
